text: Guys, in exercise 8 I gave you a bounce animation. Many of you made it, some made it wrong. In today's video, I will give you the solution to it. And after that, I will give a shoutout to all those who solved it or wrote challenge accepted. You guys like this video and write Sigma Batch O in the comment section below. Let's go to the computer screen. Let's roll the intro. So guys, I have come here to my computer screen and I am going to make a new folder here. I will go to the new folder and make a folder named video 51. So the exercise 8 I gave you, I gave you that in video number 48. So I do one thing, I will bring the video number 48's index.html here. And after that, I will open it by right-clicking and I will open it with code. And yes, I agree that somewhere there was a little exercise to put your mind in it. So yes, if you guys solved it properly, then I know that you guys know very good CSS, HTML. But now see what we have to do, we have to make this ball bounce. Once like this, once like this. So you will put two animations in it. So I am going to make the first animation by using keyframes. By the name of animate x, okay. And the second one I will make, I will make it by the name of animate y. And I will also put form here and I will put two here. So where are you going from where, what are the things I will write here, okay. So I made an animation animate x, one I made animate y. In animate x, I did left from 0 to left 100%. And in animate y, I will do bottom from 0 to bottom 100%. So if I put animation here and I write here that I just want to see animate x. How is it and let's say I write 3 seconds, I want to put it for 3 seconds. So what I will do is that I will write it linear. And along with linear, I will want it to repeat infinite times. So now I will show you this animation, so see how it will keep repeating. So it will keep going like this and it will keep repeating. Now I will remove this animation and I will say that I want exactly the same animation but I want it in y. Now the y animation, I will ease out it, I will not do linear because when the ball goes, I will ease out. When you throw the ball towards the upper side, it eases out and I will also reduce its time so that the ball bounces. I did animate y, did one second, did ease out, did infinite and I will also alternate it so that it keeps going one after the other. And now I see here, so see the ball is bouncing like this, I have alternated it, once back, once forward, once back, once forward and this ease out function, see exactly the same way, it goes like this, see what does ease out mean, it slows down at the time of the ball and what will happen by alternating, it will come as it was gone, so the ball is bouncing like this, I don't have to do anything, I just have to put both the animations together, that's about it. So I will uncomment it and I will put a comma here, you can put a comma and put multiple animations and here our ball has bounced. You see, it has become completely realistic, the ball is bouncing, you see, see this and see the ball is bouncing. So this is what we had to make, if you want it to bounce once, twice, how many times it will bounce, then you will have to do a little calculation, I have a video of projectile motion, anyway leave it, you can see if you want, but leave it now, let's leave projectile motion and this is a very simple thing, if you know physics, if you don't know physics, then it can be a little complicated for you, but again, you have learned animations, ease out means learned, alternated the animation, put it separately in Y, put it separately in X, I don't think if you don't know physics, then you will have a problem. Now what I will do is I will give you a shout out, whoever has solved this question, I am going to give him a shout out and I will open the video for him and I will give a shout out to the people who have commented on it. And along with that, I do one thing, I close my own so that you can see the shout out when I give it. But that's fine, shout out, everyone will get it, shout out to Jameel, shout out to Ujwal, shout out to Solo, shout out to Storm, shout out to the great Navid Khan, shout out to Sarex, shout out to Jai, shout out to Kodvit, shout out to Krish, shout out to Har Har Mahadev, shout out to Jameel, shout out to the great Navid Khan, Ali Hamza, StormXPlays, User DC, whatever their name is, oops, I clicked, Aman Kumar got a shout out, I have to come down again, I am coming, shout out to Tech Gaming with Nitin, shout out to Madhav, shout out to Amish, shout out to MVP, then shout out to Abdul, shout out to Vishal, shout out to Sabir Pathan, shout out to Simply, shout out to Koder, now I saw in this exercise that very few people have solved it, so that's not a problem, you understand its solution and try again, you try to make a similar animation, many things can be done, you can do it and your skills will only increase if you do it. So I hope you understood this question and you clearly understood how to put animations together and achieve this kind of animation, so if you have not accessed the playlist of Sigma Web Development course, then you must access it, there are already 1 million views in the playlist, which is a very good thing, you can click here and bookmark, click here and save, and as soon as your feedback is coming, many people are saying that why didn't we get the Sigma course earlier, we bought this and that, so I will tell you that I have made it, I have kept this thing in my mind that this is going to be the best course even if you see it after years, I don't think the front end has changed that much and this is going to be the best course out there, and I am not saying this, these are the people who have given feedback, who have done this course, and one more thing I will tell you, I will not praise the course much because the course speaks for itself and the best is yet to come, there are still many things like this, which I am going to put in it, which will tell you the worth of this course, if it is a free course, then please don't take it lightly, I will add a lot of things to it, and I know that the views in the last videos are very low, which are the videos below, but it doesn't matter to me, I will put as much energy as I put, in fact, I am going to put more energy and make this course the best course, so remember this, I don't want to say much about this, time will tell that how good web development will teach you, and my goal will be that you have to make the job ready, and I want as many people as possible to access it and become job ready for free, with that said, thank you so much for watching this video, and I will see you next time.
